initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom ON connected.atom_id = atom.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carbon
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom ON connected.atom_id = atom.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carbon
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom ON connected.atom_id = atom.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN bond ON atom.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom ON connected.atom_id = atom.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';
